args.command: find /input/repo -type f -name "*.py" | head -20
ls -la /input/repo/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No markdown files in repo root"
ls -la /input/repo/logalyzer/*.py
ls -la /input/repo/logalyzer/web.py 2>/dev/null || echo "web.py does not exist"
ls -la /input/repo/logalyzer/cache.py 2>/dev/null || echo "cache.py does not exist"
grep -n "from collections import" /input/repo/logalyzer/filters.py
grep -n "eval(" /input/repo/logalyzer/filters.py
grep -n "SQL\|sql\|query\|INSERT\|UPDATE" /input/repo/logalyzer/*.py
grep -n "tail\|stream" /input/repo/logalyzer/*.py
grep -n "args.top" /input/repo/logalyzer/cli.py
grep -n "import.*experimental" /input/repo/logalyzer/*.py
grep -n "format_legacy" /input/repo/logalyzer/*.py
grep -n "format_legacy" /input/repo/logalyzer/*.py /input/repo/logalyzer/__init__.py 2>/dev/null
grep -n "result = result + \[" /input/repo/logalyzer/io.py
grep -n "accumulated +=" /input/repo/logalyzer/io.py
grep -n "accumulated" /input/repo/logalyzer/io.py
grep -n "LogEntry" /input/repo/logalyzer/__init__.py
python3 -c "from collections import Iterable" 2>&1
python3 -c "from collections.abc import Iterable; print('OK')"
python3 -c "from logalyzer import __version__; print('OK')"
cd /input/repo && python3 -c "from logalyzer import __version__; print('OK')"
cd /input/repo && python3 -c "from logalyzer.parser import LogEntry; print('OK')"
cd /input/repo && python3 -c "from logalyzer import LogEntry" 2>&1
cd /input/repo && python3 -c "from logalyzer.filters import expression_filter; print('OK')"
cd /input/repo && python3 -c "from logalyzer.io import load; print('OK')"

cd /input/repo && python3 -c "from logalyzer.experimental import detect_anomalies; print('OK')"
cd /input/repo && python3 -c "from logalyzer import main; print('OK')" 2>&1
cd /input/repo && python3 -c "from logalyzer.cli import main; print('OK')"
